summary: Frontend testing of Simulacros (Quiz) system completed. All 10 requested test cases verified. Core functionality is working: quiz creation dialog, chapter/lesson selection with checkboxes, quiz settings (questions 5-15, difficulty, time limit), active quiz view with timer, answer selection, submission, and Chilean grade (1-7) calculation. Delete functionality also working.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot create quiz through UI when selecting chapters because existing questions in database don't have chapter_id assigned. Frontend requires chapter selection (button disabled without it), but backend returns 'No hay preguntas disponibles' when filtering by chapter_id.
integration_issues.root_cause: Questions were created before chapter_id feature was added - they have topic field but no chapter_id

action_items: CRITICAL: Update existing questions in database to assign chapter_id based on their topic field (e.g., 'Límites' → 'chapter-001', 'Derivadas' → 'chapter-002')
OR: Modify frontend to allow quiz creation without chapter selection (fallback to all questions in course)
critical_code_review_comments: Simulacros.js:415 - Button disabled logic requires chapter selection: disabled={creating || !selectedCourse || (getSelectedChapterIds().length === 0)}
server.py:406-413 - Backend filters by chapter_id when provided, but questions have null chapter_id

success_rate.frontend: 90% - All UI components working, but quiz creation blocked by data issue

seed_data_creation: Created quizzes via API for testing (bypassing chapter filter)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simulacros component (Simulacros.js) works correctly. CreateQuizDialog, ActiveQuizView, QuizCard all functioning. The blocking issue is DATA-related: questions in MongoDB don't have chapter_id set, but frontend requires chapter selection. Fix: run migration script to update questions with chapter_id based on their topic field.

test1_simulacros_page.details: Page loads at /simulacros with 'Simulacros de Prueba' title, 'Crear simulacro' button visible

test2_create_dialog_opens.details: Clicking 'Crear simulacro' opens dialog with title 'Crear Nuevo Simulacro'

test3_course_selection.details: Course selector shows 'Cálculo Diferencial', selecting it loads chapters

test4_chapter_expansion.details: Expanding 'Límites' chapter shows 2 lessons with checkboxes: 'Introducción' and 'Definición épsilon-delta'

test5_checkbox_selection.details: Clicking chapter checkbox selects it (green checkmark), also auto-selects all child lessons

test6_settings_selectors.details: Preguntas selector has options 5-15, Dificultad has Todas/Fácil/Medio/Difícil, Tiempo límite has Sin límite/10-60 min options

test7_quiz_creation_with_chapter.details: Button enabled when chapter selected, but API returns 400 'No hay preguntas disponibles' - questions lack chapter_id in DB

test8_active_quiz_view.details: Tested via API: Shows course title, timer (countdown), question counter '0/5 respondidas', questions with LaTeX rendering, A-D options

test9_answer_and_submit.details: Clicking option selects it, counter updates. 'Enviar respuestas' button submits quiz

test10_chilean_grade_display.details: Results show: Grade (1-7) with colored badge, X/5 Correctas, Porcentaje, Tiempo. Quiz card shows 'Nota: X' badge for completed quizzes

delete_quiz.details: Delete button shows confirmation '¿Eliminar este simulacro?', confirms deletion with 'Simulacro eliminado' toast

reintentar_button.details: Completed quizzes show 'Reintentar' button instead of 'Comenzar'

timer_countdown.details: Timer shows MM:SS format counting down from time limit

CreateQuizDialog.chapter_list: Shows chapters with checkboxes, expandable to show lessons
CreateQuizDialog.create_button: 'Crear y Comenzar' - enabled only when course AND chapter selected

ActiveQuizView.header: Course title, counter 'X/Y respondidas', Timer (font-mono), Cancel button
ActiveQuizView.questions: data-testid='quiz-question-X' - shows question text with LaTeX

QuizResults.summary_card: Grade badge (colored), Correctas count, Porcentaje, Tiempo
QuizResults.question_results: Green checkmark for correct, red X for wrong, Explicación section

QuizCard.body: Quiz title, Course name, question count, time limit, date

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Quiz creation fails when chapter is selected
reproduction_steps: 6. Error toast: 'No hay preguntas disponibles para los filtros seleccionados'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Questions in database have chapter_id: null. When frontend sends chapter_ids, backend builds query with $or: [{chapter_id: {$in: chapter_ids}}] which returns 0 results
rca_of_the_issue.evidence: API call: POST /api/quiz/start with chapter_ids=['chapter-001'] returns 400. Same call with chapter_ids=[] returns 200 with 5 questions
fix_options: Option 1: Migration script to update questions: db.questions.updateMany({topic: 'Límites'}, {$set: {chapter_id: 'chapter-001'}})
Option 2: Modify frontend to allow creation without chapter selection
Option 3: Modify backend to fallback to course-wide query when chapter filter returns 0 results
